title: salvia dorrii
intro: Salvia dorrii, also known as blue sage, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Native American medicine, to treat a variety of ailments. The plant is known to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Salvia dorrii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being, including relief from stress and anxiety.
